##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(K,Ca,Na)(Fe,Mg,Al)_8_(Si,Al)_12_(O,OH)_36_·nH_2_O
##LOCALITY=Broughton talc mine, Saint-Pierre-de-Broughton, Quebec, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Donald Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregates of dark green plates, 180 deg twin around (-2 0 3) = [0 1 2].
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
